string.name: code
string.title: Currency code
string.help: ISO 4217 currency code, e.g. USD, EUR, RUB

integer.name: nominal
integer.title: Nominal
integer.help: Number of foreign currency units for the rate

decimal.name: rate
decimal.title: Rate (KGS)
decimal.help: Rate in Kyrgyz Som (KGS) for the given nominal

date.name: rateDate
date.title: Rate date
date.help: Date of the rate as published by NBKR
